{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = XK-21 laser rifle
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sola]] replaced her shotgun with an [[XK-21 laser rifle]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
